title: regime-shap: Quantifying SHAP Feature Importance Stability Across Structural Breaks
description: regime-shap is a Python package that measures how stable a tree model's SHAP feature importance is across regimes (distinct time periods such as structural breaks). It computes per-regime mean absolute SHAP importance, compares the rankings with Spearman rank correlation, classifies the result using the Akoglu (2018) stability bands, and attaches bootstrap confidence intervals for short regimes.
